title: Hot Rum Toddy Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Rum Toddy | BACARDÍ Global
clean_text: Hot Rum Toddy Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Rum Toddy | BACARDÍ Global OUR RUMS OUR RUMS White Rum BACARDÍ CARTA BLANCA Flavors Flavors Range Spiced BACARDÍ Spiced Dark Rum BACARDÍ Carta Oro BACARDÍ Carta Negra BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Diez BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Limitada ready to enjoy BACARDÍ x coca-cola Ready to Drink cocktails Ready to Serve cocktails BACARDÍ Coquito View all our rums Cocktails Experiences Experiences Casa BACARDÍ Puerto Rico Visit the World’s largest premium rum distillery. SUSTAINABILITY Our World FAQS BASE RUM BACARDÍ Carta Oro rum COCKTAILS Rum Toddy From crisp nights to après ski, the Hot Rum Toddy warms you up with its Caribbean heat. A comforting cocktail, it's perfect for cosying up with close friends. Give your intimate gatherings a warm glow with this cosy cocktail. How to make a Rum Toddy 50 ml BACARDÍ Carta Oro rum 100 ml hot water 12.5 ml honey 1 lemon wedge(s) Servings Copy Rum Toddy ingredients Copied! Rum Toddy recipe One step at a time 1 Pour Pour hot water into a tempered glass mug. 2 Squeeze Squeeze the lemon wedge into the water, add honey, and stir until the honey is dissolved. 3 Stir Add BACARDÍ Carta Oro gold rum, and stir gently. 4 Garnish Garnish with a cinnamon stick and a lemon slice. MERCHANDISE GET KITTED OUT Glasses. Squeezers. Cocktail kits. Discover everything you need to create standout BACARDÍ cocktails. SHOP NOW OUR RECOMMENDED rum COCKTAILS Like This? Try These If this is your kind of cocktail, here’s our selection of other BACARDÍ cocktails that might suit your taste VIEW ALL RUM COCKTAILS BACARDÍ Coquito Ginger Snap Pineapple Potion Rum Mule Old Cuban Drag to discover more VIEW ALL RUM COCKTAILS FAQ WANT TO KNOW MORE? How do you make rum? Rum is made using only three ingredients: molasses from sugarcane, yeast and water. Ingredients are fermented, then distilled, aged, filtered and blended. What is the difference between dark, gold and white rum? Rum is a wonderfully complex and diverse spirit. Color can give us clues about time spent aging or the flavours that might be found within. Dark can be bold, sweet (or dry) and even smoky, gold is rich and soothing, and white is smooth, subtle and often refreshing. But color can be misleading. The best way to truly understand a rum is to taste it for yourself. SOCIAL MOVE WITH US A soft sway, or a lively dance. We have something for everyone.
